title: Reading: Arrhenius and the Greenhouse Effect
description: Read the module notes and the assigned primary source, then post one discussion reflection.

title: Quiz: Module 1 Concepts
description: Ten short questions on the early history of climate science. Untimed, open notes.

title: Short Essay: What the Kyoto Protocol Changed
description: In 600 to 800 words, assess the Kyoto Protocol's binding-target approach and its limits.

title: Discussion: Comparing Rio and Paris
description: Post a comparison of the 1992 Rio framework and the 2015 Paris Agreement, then reply to one classmate.

title: Quiz: Module 6 Concepts
description: Fifteen questions on the Paris Agreement and post-2015 climate policy. Untimed, open notes.

title: Reading: The Antiquities Act and the Public Lands
description: Read the unit notes and post a reflection on early federal land conservation.

title: Final Essay: A Turning Point in U.S. Land Policy
description: Choose one statute or court decision and explain its lasting effect on land-management policy.
